title: Kolte-Patil Developers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kolte-Patil Developers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Kolte-Patil Developers has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
